DictionaryViewSet
• list() → GET /
• create() → POST
• retrieve/update/destroy
• toggle_active()
• export_csv()

• list(status, search)
• summary() → stats
• approve()
• reject()
• correct()
• add_to_dictionary()
• bulk_approve()
• bulk_add_to_dict()

DictionaryEntry
id, key (unique)
value, is_active
created_by, updated_by
created_at, updated_at

id, original_word
abbreviated_form, status

created_by_ai (bool)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
suggest_rename()
• Normalizar nombre
• Validar contra 12 reglas
• Llamar Groq
• Retornar sugerencia

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
abbreviate_word()
• Buscar en Dictionary
• Buscar en AIAbbreviation
• Si no existe: llamar IA
• Guardar con status pending

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
validate_name()
Validar 12 reglas:
1. Minúsculas
2. Sin tildes
3. Sin conectores
4. Espacios=
5. Sin paréntesis
6. Solo a-z,0-9,,.
7. Sin duplicados
8. Fecha inicio
9. Sin genéricas
10. Max 50 chars
11. Sin prefijos
12. Usar diccionario

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
validate_against_rules()
Ejecutar 12 reglas
Retornar violations
Score 0-100

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
check_rule_12()
Verificar palabras en
• DictionaryEntry (oficial)
• AIGeneratedAbbreviation
Detectar desconocidas
